_comment: interaction 阶段 frontend_engineering（prototype.delivery_mode=frontend_engineering）路线 hook 镜像。活跃实现是单一 dispatcher 模型：.harness/common/hooks/checks/prototype_as_frontend.py，经 registry["interaction"] = design.ENTRIES + prototype_as_frontend.ENTRIES 路由。本目录为旧 per-stage 源镜像，与 dispatcher 行为对齐：改前端代码（frontend-changeset.md）→ 置脏 prototype-as-frontend.contract.yaml；PASS 必须在 pending=false 时由 record-review 产生。两条 hook 只在路径/命令指向 prototype-as-frontend 产物时触发，对 interactive_prototype 路线无副作用。

hooks.purpose: Set prototype-as-frontend.contract.yaml effectiveness_review.pending_reviewer_recheck=true after frontend-changeset.md edit so the reviewer PASS gate fires (改代码→旧 PASS 失效).
Block `harness contract record-review --verdict PASS` against prototype-as-frontend.contract.yaml when pending_reviewer_recheck=true (re-run frontend-reviewer first).
